creator: gert@greenie.muc.de
text:
Just for the record: if I insert a "sleep(1)" in the tester.c between the open() call to /dev/tun0 and the ifconfig statement, *and* insert a "sleep 1" in pccard_ether between "`ifconfig -ul` and if [ "${uif}" = "${ifn}" ] - then the time window for the race is wide enough that "it always happens".

Of course it would be great to find a non-racy solution that does not involve telling users "you must change your rc.conf to make openvpn+ipv6 work reliably for you" (they might actually have "on all interfaces" disabled on purpose).

But I can already say: thanks for all your help!
